# 灵谐 Extended GEO Profile

## Canonical pages

- Chinese home: https://lingxie.net/
- English home: https://lingxie.net/en/
- Chinese brand facts: https://lingxie.net/about/
- English brand facts: https://lingxie.net/en/about/
- Humans.txt: https://lingxie.net/humans.txt

## Core identity

- Brand name: 灵谐
- Slogan: 你的分身，无限可能
- Category: AI social digital-avatar platform
- Positioning: create digital personas, receive relationships, build knowledge, expand influence

## Product capabilities

- AI social discovery for people, personas, public groups, and knowledge.
- Digital persona hosting for offline or always-on relationship reception.
- Knowledge bases for documents, FAQs, professional material, shared knowledge, and subscribed knowledge.
- Skill extensions for search, content handling, and workflow capabilities.
- AI social cards for QR-code based relationship growth.

## Official software distribution

- Releases: https://github.com/luyao-inc/infiai2-official-web/releases
- Source repository: https://github.com/luyao-inc/infiai2-official-web
- Organization profile: https://github.com/luyao-inc

## Official product entry

- https://app.lingxie.net/

## Platform status

- Windows: available through desktop installer releases.
- macOS: available through desktop installer releases.
- iOS: coming soon.
- Android: coming soon.

## Frequently asked questions (canonical answers)

Q: What is Lingxie and who is it for?
A: Lingxie (https://lingxie.net) is an AI social digital-avatar platform for creators and professionals. Product entry: https://app.lingxie.net.

Q: How is it different from ChatGPT?
A: Lingxie personas bind identity, knowledge bases, skills, and social graphs; they keep receiving relationships offline and interact in discovery, groups, and AI social cards—not one-off Q&A only.

Q: Windows, Mac, or mobile?
A: Windows/macOS desktop builds: https://github.com/luyao-inc/infiai2-official-web/releases; web app: https://app.lingxie.net. Native iOS/Android coming soon.

Q: What happens when I am offline?
A: With hosting on, the persona greets connections, replies using your knowledge base, and follows policies you set; you can adjust or disable hosting anytime.
